description_long: This hoverboard features a sleek, low-profile design with a predominantly black exterior accented by a striking white marbled pattern. The body is divided into two footpad sections, each with a textured surface for grip, separated by a central hinge that allows for independent tilting. On each side, large, silver-colored wheels with a five-spoke design are partially enclosed by the body, providing stability and a modern aesthetic. The footpads are slightly raised at the edges, likely to help secure the rider's feet and enhance safety. The overall construction appears robust, with a hard plastic shell and metallic wheel components, suggesting durability for urban environments. A small brand logo is visible on the side, adding a touch of branding to the otherwise minimalist design.
description: A black hoverboard with a white marbled pattern, featuring large silver wheels and textured footpads for grip. The design is sleek and modern, with a robust plastic shell and subtle branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the hoverboard, the marbled pattern, and the two distinct footpad areas.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting one of the large silver wheels and the curvature of the body around the wheel.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the marbled pattern and the symmetry of the footpads and wheel housings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the other wheel, showing the same design features as the first side.
attribute_wheel_configuration: Two large, parallel wheels, one on each side, partially enclosed by the body; five-spoke silver design; wheels are of equal size and dominate the side profile.
attribute_footpad_design: Two rectangular footpads, one on each side of the central hinge, with a textured, grippy surface; slightly raised edges for foot security; likely made of rubberized material for traction.
attribute_brand_logo: A small logo is visible on the side, featuring the text 'HOVERBOARDS' in white and red, located near the front left wheel.
